note: CONSTRUCTED single-domain demo incidents (NOT real detections), added so the dashboard shows the full decision spectrum (step-up / throttle) alongside the real corroborated REVOKE incidents. Same honesty discipline as demo_scenarios.json.

reasons.raw_value: CONSTRUCTED demo (not a real detection): a large legitimate-looking CASH_OUT (isFraud=0) on payments_analyst E010's account C1793991913. Fraud-risk 0.78 is a SET-FOR-DEMO value -- the PaySim model is near-binary (no genuine mid-range score exists), so a moderate score is itself synthetic. No behavioral (PS1) corroboration -> confidence low -> STEP-UP verification, not revoke (realistic false-positive handling).

CONSTRUCTED demo scenario built on a REAL CERT event: off-hours logon (row {G8L5-G8EA91ZE-0726XMMK}) at 2010-01-02 06:46:00 on PC-4365 by ROR3483 (operations_analyst E015). Behavioral risk 0.6 is a documented heuristic. No transactional (PS2) corroboration -> confidence low -> THROTTLE.
